title: Former US Air Force general linked to UFO research goes missing in New Mexico
description: Disappearance of Air Force veteran William Neil McCasland sparks concern as silver alert issued and sheriff’s office appeals to public for information on his whereabouts

title: RAAF UFO Files Reveal Object Racing 3,600mph Over Nuclear Test Range Before Vanishing Into Upper Atmosphere
description: Declassified files reveal a 1954 RAAF UFO encounter where radar tracked a mysterious circular object flying 3,600 mph over the Woomera nuclear test range.

title: Navy FOIA Bombshell as Secret UFO Program AATIP Resurfaces in Classified 2022 Pentagon Briefing With Mystery Guests
description: FOIA records reveal a secret 2022 Navy briefing on AATIP and UAP investigations, years after the Pentagon claimed the UFO programme had ended.

title: Man spots UFO over the Albert Dock that 'disappears with a pop'
description: Gideon Allen claims to be a magnet for UFOs

title: Clues in 'Majestic-12' UFO files the FBI claimed were fake prove secret alien unit was real, researcher claims
description: A new investigation into an infamous UFO conspiracy claims to have uncovered proof that top-secret documents labels as fakes are actually real.
